title: West Coast Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in West Coast, NZ, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance, to make your family holiday more affordable and enjoyable.
intro: The West Coast of New Zealand is a haven for families, with its stunning glaciers, wild beaches, and gold rush history. To make the most of your family holiday, we've rounded up the best deals and discounts available. With prices starting from $89/day for campervan hire and up to 40% off activities, you can have a fun and memorable trip without breaking the bank.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals
sections.body:
Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in popular destinations, including Rotorua, Queenstown, and Auckland. However, you can also find great deals on West Coast activities, such as guided hikes and wildlife tours. Additionally, Discover Cars has family campervans available from $89/day, making it an affordable option for families to explore the region.

Booking.com is also offering free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings, giving you more flexibility when planning your trip. And, with Cover-More travel insurance starting from $4.50/day, you can have peace of mind while traveling with your family.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities
sections.body:
The West Coast is home to many free and low-cost activities that are perfect for families. The Punakaiki Pancake Rocks and Blowholes are a must-visit, and the short walk to the terminal face of the Franz Josef Glacier is a great way to experience the region's stunning natural beauty. The Hokitika Gorge walkway is another free activity that offers breathtaking views of the turquoise river.

For families with children aged 5+, these activities are both fun and educational, making them an excellent choice for a family holiday. With prices starting from $150-$250/day for a family of four, you can have a great time exploring the West Coast without breaking the bank.

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips
sections.body:
To make the most of your family holiday in the West Coast, here are some money-saving tips to keep in mind. Firstly, book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices. Secondly, consider visiting during the shoulder season (April-May or September-November) when prices are lower.

Thirdly, pack your own food and snacks instead of eating out for every meal. Fourthly, take advantage of free activities such as the Punakaiki Pancake Rocks and Hokitika Gorge walkway. Fifthly, use cashback and rewards credit cards for your expenses. And lastly, consider hiring a campervan instead of booking separate accommodation and transportation.
list: Book in advance for best prices
Pack your own food and snacks
Use cashback and rewards credit cards

sections.heading: When to Book
sections.body:
To get the best prices, it's essential to book your activities, accommodation, and transportation in advance. For popular activities and accommodation, book at least 2-3 months in advance. For campervan hire, book at least 6-12 months in advance, especially during peak season.

Additionally, consider booking during the off-season or shoulder season when prices are lower. And, be flexible with your travel dates to get the best deals. With Bookme.co.nz, you can find great deals on activities and book them in advance to save up to 40%.
